# Irfan Rakasiwi Pasman — Full Profile

> Video Editor & Hand-Creative Professional | Medan, Indonesia

## About

Irfan Rakasiwi Pasman is a video editor and hand-creative professional with over 7 years of experience in the creative visual industry. He has been working as a freelance video editor since 2019, and has completed more than 100 projects for clients across multiple industries in Medan, Indonesia and beyond.

He handles the complete end-to-end video editing process: footage acquisition, rough cut, color grading, motion graphics, sound design, and final delivery.

## Professional Skills

### Video Production
- Video Editing (end-to-end)
- Motion Graphics
- Color Grading
- Visual Storytelling
- Sound Design

### Tools & Software
- Adobe Premiere Pro
- Adobe After Effects

### Content Specializations
- Cinematic property videos (walkthrough, aerial, visual presentations)
- Personal branding content (for creators, entrepreneurs, professionals)
- Commercial & industrial videos (ads, company profiles, product showcases, marketing campaigns)

## Work Experience

### Freelance Video Editor
**Self-Employed** | 2019 - Present
- Completed 100+ video projects across property, personal branding, and commercial industries
- Produces cinematic property videos including walkthrough, aerial, and visual presentations to support property sales and marketing
- Develops personal branding video content for content creators, entrepreneurs, and professionals building their digital presence
- Executes end-to-end editing: footage acquisition, rough cut, color grading, motion graphics, sound design, final delivery
- Maintains a digital portfolio at https://irfanpasman.cirrus-hub.net

### Staff Administrasi Produksi
**PT. Musim Mas, Medan** | November 2019 - December 2020
- Compiled and organized production-related documentation
- Monitored and documented oil production processes
- Coordinated with team members on machinery maintenance schedules

### Marketing Officer
**PT. Cipta Oase Dunia (Hotel Keuskupan Agung Medan)** | June 2017 - October 2019
- Conducted prospect visits and partnership presentations
- Executed sales calls and telemarketing activities
- Handled customer inquiries and complaints professionally

### Resepsionis
**PT. Cipta Oase Dunia (Hotel Keuskupan Agung Medan)** | May 2016 - May 2017
- Guest reception, check-in/check-out documentation, room coordination

### Pramuniaga Toko
**PT. Gramedia Tbk, Medan** | March 2015 - April 2016
- Product display management, customer recommendations, complaint handling

## Education

**SMA Santa Maria Medan**
Program Ilmu Pengetahuan Sosial | Graduated 2014
Average National Exam Score: 8.1

## Services Offered

### 1. Property Video Production
Cinematic property tour videos including walkthrough, aerial footage, and visual presentations. Ideal for real estate marketing, luxury estates, apartments, and housing developments.

### 2. Personal Branding Video
Authentic and professional video content to help build personal brands. Perfect for content creators, entrepreneurs, and professionals looking to establish their digital presence across social media platforms.

### 3. Commercial & Industrial Video
Commercial videos and advertisements for diverse industry needs: product showcases, company profiles, marketing campaigns, and promotional content with high visual impact.
